---
title: Page Not Found
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
h1 {
  text-align: center;
}

p {
  text-align: center;
}
</style>

The page you requested cannot be found (perhaps it was moved or renamed).

You may want to try searching to find the page's new location.

👉 [Return to the openair book](index.qmd).

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-height: 4
openair::polarPlot(
  head(openair::mydata, n = 5),
  key.position = "none",
  plot = FALSE
)$plot +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    geom = "text",
    x = I(0.5),
    y = I(0.5),
    label = "?",
    size = 50
  )
```
